Title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
Writer: Tim Hill, Jonathan Aibel, Glenn Berger
Actors: Tim Hill, Clancy Brown, Bill Fagerbakke
Plot: When SpongeBob SquarePants's pet snail Gary gets kidnapped by Poseidon and taken to the Lost City of Atlantic City, he and his best friend Patrick Star must go on a rescue mission to save him from the dastardly plan of Poseidon before it is too late.
